problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine may resolve Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
